labels: healthy sorghum leaf with no rust pustules, clean green leaf surface
sorghum leaf with few small rust pustules, orange-brown spots on 1-10% of leaf area
sorghum leaf with moderate rust infection, orange-brown pustules on 11-25% of leaf area
sorghum leaf with heavy rust infection, dense orange-brown pustules covering 26-50% of leaf
sorghum leaf severely damaged by rust, over 50% covered with coalescing orange-brown pustules, leaf tissue dying
